c.d: The richness and flexibility of the note-taking tools available within the app, including text formatting, multimedia support, and organization features.
c.s: App Store, User Reviews, Expert Reviews

c.d: The intuitiveness and ease of navigation within the app, affecting the speed and efficiency of note creation and retrieval.
The ability to seamlessly synchronize notes across multiple devices and operating systems.
The effectiveness and speed of the app's search feature in locating specific notes or information.
Tools such as folders, tags, and linking capabilities that enable users to categorize and structure their notes effectively.
The app's ability to integrate with other productivity tools and services, such as calendars, project management software, and cloud storage.
The presence and quality of AI-powered features that help summarize, generate, edit, transcribe, and organize notes.
The cost of the app, including any subscription fees or in-app purchases, and the value provided for the price.
